name: compliance-stack-mcp-server
description: Enterprise-grade AI compliance and governance platform with zero-data-egress auditing. Audits AI models against EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, ISO/IEC 42001, GDPR, and India DPDP Act with a 17-phase pipeline. Issues W3C Verifiable Credentials.

tools.name: classify_ai_risk
tools.description: EU AI Act risk tier classification (Prohibited, High, Limited, Minimal)

tools.name: discover_supply_chain
tools.description: Auto-discover ML models and datasets on filesystem, populate Neo4j provenance graph

tools.name: audit_supply_chain
tools.description: Audit AI model supply chain via Neo4j provenance graph

tools.name: verify_human_oversight
tools.description: Verify HITL and kill-switch controls (BLOCKER FAIL if missing)

tools.name: run_bias_assessment
tools.description: Fairlearn bias assessment: demographic parity, equal opportunity, disparate impact

tools.name: generate_dpia
tools.description: GDPR Art. 35 DPIA with cross-border transfer analysis

tools.name: run_adversarial_tests
tools.description: Adversarial robustness testing: prompt injection, jailbreak, OOD, model inversion

tools.name: score_audit_weighted
tools.description: Aggregate audit phases into weighted score (0-100), BLOCKER FAIL halts certification

tools.name: generate_audit_certificate
tools.description: Issue W3C Verifiable Credential (Ed25519-signed) for completed audit

tools.name: monitor_model_drift
tools.description: Evidently AI drift detection with auto re-audit via Redis Streams
